description: Nathaniel Malick, having captured Daisy and Sousa, makes a call in the cell block seeking Daniel Whitehall’s instructions on transferring enhanced abilities via surgery. His intent to experiment on Daisy becomes clear, leaving their fate uncertain as the episode ends on a dark note.

transcript.line: White hair. Round glasses. Total “Mein Kampf” vibe. You can't miss him. No. Mnh-mnh. No, Daniel Whitehall. Daniel. Cell block D. No, I don't want to see the old man. I just want his instructions. Detailed instructions. Yes, genius, I want them written down. He had a theory about transferring enhanced abilities surgically. I'm gonna find out if it works.
